sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Player at A (rows 8-12, cols 14-18)
# Try SPACE repeatedly to map the maze
positions = []
for i in range(10):
    after_seg = current_frame.segmentation
    for node in after_seg['nodes']:
        if node['pixels'] == 24 and node['color'] == 'b':
            pos = (node['boundary'][0][0], node['boundary'][0][1])  # top-left corner
            positions.append(pos)
            print(f"Step {i}: Player at {pos}")
            break
    action(['SPACE'])
    if last_action_result.get('game_over'):
        print("Game over!")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
